task: move green rice chip bag near redbull can
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green rice chip bag is on a brown table. A red open drawer is below the table. The bag is a flexible package with a printed design. STRATEGY - The task is to move the bag, so first reach and grasp it, then transport it to a new position on the table. Failure modes include dropping the bag during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bag body to approach it. Step 2 grasp the bag body for a secure hold. Step 3 transport the bag to a new location on the table. Step 4 place the bag on the table.

Goal: on(green_rice_chip_bag, table); stable(green_rice_chip_bag)
Scene: green_rice_chip_bag, table, drawer
Step 1: reach(green_rice_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green rice chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_rice_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_rice_chip_bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_rice_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green rice chip bag
  contact: holding(green_rice_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_rice_chip_bag)
Step 3: transport(green_rice_chip_bag -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(green_rice_chip_bag, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_rice_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(green_rice_chip_bag, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_rice_chip_bag -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(green_rice_chip_bag, table) [completion]; released(green_rice_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_rice_chip_bag) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_rice_chip_bag, table) AND released(green_rice_chip_bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>
